reviews.comment:
Pare este domingo 24 de Noviembre.. No se si la señora de limpieza estaba enferma o que, pero los baños de mujeres estaban todos sucios, desbordando de papeles y olor a orin por todos lados. Horrible.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped by this Sunday, November 24th. I don't know if the cleaning lady was sick or what, but the women's restrooms were filthy, overflowing with toilet paper, and smelled of urine everywhere. Horrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNaWRYWmtnRRAB
